summary: Ran live xdg-desktop-portal ScreenCast chooser probes against node-scoped Hyprland outputs. The chooser appeared and a targeted keyboard sequence was sent, but SelectSources still timed out. No Start response, stream ids, OpenPipeWireRemote fd, or PipeWire video stream metadata were reached. The node completes with a precise blocker and leaves m2-capture-one-frame blocked.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Use node-scoped madobe output/workspace setup and cleanup evidence.
Run visible portal client flow with parent/window token if supported.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: portal-client.txt and kbd3-portal-client.txt show the portal client lifecycle through CreateSession and SelectSources.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Capture whether the chooser appears and whether it can be selected or approved autonomously.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: chooser-detection.txt and kbd3-chooser-detection.txt show chooser_seen=true; kbd3-portal-client-status.txt records status 7 after keyboard automation.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: If SelectSources returns, continue Start, stream ids, OpenPipeWireRemote, and PipeWire metadata.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validation-summary.json records that SelectSources did not return, so Start/OpenPipeWireRemote were not reached.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: If autonomous completion is impossible, record the exact UI/manual action or portal limitation and keep m2-capture-one-frame blocked.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: blocker.md records the visible chooser timeout and unavailable ydotool click automation; validation-summary.json keeps m2-capture-one-frame blocked.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No third-party Rust deps without separate policy node/finding.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only evidence/report files were added; Cargo manifests are unchanged.

commandsRun.command: hyprctl output create/configure/remove node-scoped generated outputs
wtype targeted keyboard interaction against visible chooser
pw-dump focused summary after portal client

realWorldValidation.evidence: Live Linux Hyprland, xdg-desktop-portal, wtype, and PipeWire probes were collected. The accepted outcome is a documented chooser interaction blocker.

residualRisks: Click-based chooser approval was not tested because ydotool could not access its daemon socket from this session.
No stream ids, PipeWire remote fd, DMA-BUF format, modifier, timestamp, or sync metadata were obtained.
dagChangesNeeded: Keep m2-capture-one-frame blocked until a consented portal flow or direct capture path provides stream metadata.
